course.title: Principles of Marketing: An AI-Integrated Approach
course.tagline: Teach Principles of Marketing, and prepare students for the world of AI.
course.subtitle: A complete, instructor-ready package that teaches marketing and how to practice it with AI: a dual-depth interactive textbook, slides, teaching notes, projects, a test bank, and a deploy kit, with hands-on AI in every chapter so students graduate fluent in the tools the job now expects. Held to WCAG 2.2 AA.

groups.title: Read & Reference
groups.blurb: The text students read to learn marketing and how to do it with AI, plus the reference layer on top.

groups.title: Teach
groups.blurb: What you bring to the room to teach marketing in the AI era: slides, notes, videos, cases, and live activities.

groups.title: Assess
groups.blurb: Graded work and hands-on projects where students practice marketing with AI, plus the question banks behind them.

groups.title: Adopt & Deploy
groups.blurb: Drop this AI-ready course into your term and your LMS with the paperwork done.

groups.title: Build
groups.blurb: Go further: use AI to build your own course tools, from a teaching assistant to a Canvas dashboard and live LMS access.

components.title: Textbook
components.blurb: 27 chapters in two depths, Comprehensive or Concise, each pairing a marketing concept with hands-on AI work students do themselves.

components.title: Glossary
components.blurb: Every key term defined in plain language and cross-linked back to its chapter.

components.title: AI Prompt Library
components.blurb: Copy-paste prompts students run to turn each chapter's framework into hands-on AI practice.

components.title: Datasets
components.blurb: Clean, classroom-ready datasets students analyze with AI across the projects and in-chapter work.

components.title: Slides
components.blurb: Lecture decks per chapter, on the book's visual system, ready to present or edit.

components.title: Teaching Notes / Instructor Guide
components.blurb: Session-by-session guidance: timing, talking points, discussion prompts, and pitfalls.

components.title: Lecture Videos
components.blurb: Short, animated lecture videos. The Pricing chapter is recorded; the rest are in production.

components.title: Cases
components.blurb: Teaching cases students work with AI, tied to the chapters' running brand examples.

components.title: In-class Kit
components.blurb: Live polls, think-pair-share prompts, and quick activities to run the room.

components.title: Assignments
components.blurb: Graded assignments that have students do real marketing work with AI, mapped to each chapter's objectives.

components.title: Projects P1–P3
components.blurb: Three scaffolded team projects that take a real brand from research to a marketing plan, using AI at each step the way the job now works.

components.title: Test & Quiz Bank
components.blurb: A large bank of quiz and exam items that test marketing judgment for the AI era, tagged by chapter and objective, export-ready.

components.title: Rubrics
components.blurb: Transparent grading rubrics for every project and major assignment.

components.title: Answer Keys
components.blurb: Worked solutions and model answers for assignments and the test bank.

components.title: Syllabus + Pacing Guide
components.blurb: An editable syllabus and a week-by-week pacing guide you can adapt to your term.

components.title: Canvas / LMS Cartridge
components.blurb: A Common Cartridge import that drops modules, assignments, and the test bank into your LMS.

components.title: AACSB Outcomes Map
components.blurb: A mapping of chapters and assessments to AACSB assurance-of-learning outcomes.

components.title: Build an AI Teaching Assistant
components.blurb: A guided track to stand up your own AI assistant grounded in this course's materials.

components.title: Build an Interactive Dashboard on Canvas
components.blurb: Use AI to build a single-page course dashboard and embed it in Canvas with one iframe, so a large, multi-section course feels navigable instead of overwhelming.

components.title: Canvas MCP
components.blurb: An MCP server that gives AI coding agents full access to Canvas LMS, so Claude, Cursor, Codex, and 40+ other agents manage assignments, grades, and modules in plain language.
